subject: [PATCH v2 07/10] nfsd: return NFS4ERR_NOTSUPP for unsupported netloc4 types

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch updates the NFS server to return NFS4ERR_NOTSUPP for unsupported netloc4 types, specifically NL4_NAME and NL4_URL, which are well-formed XDR but not supported by this server. The patch modifies the nfsd4_decode_nl4_server function to discard these types and return an error code instead of a misleading bad XDR error. This change ensures that the stream remains consistent and allows for more accurate error handling in the NFS protocol.
